mission: Make the current DreamCo system reliable, organized, and demonstrable before expanding into more new projects.

goals.title: Verify the repository
goals.outcome: One correct GitHub repository, clean branch status, pull and push path confirmed, and Actions failures visible.

goals.title: Complete the bot inventory
goals.outcome: Every bot has purpose, inputs, outputs, revenue opportunity, API notes, status, and test path.

goals.title: Finish Buddy as dashboard controller
goals.outcome: Buddy shows divisions, launches test packets, tracks errors, documents bots, and routes rebuild/debug work.

goals.title: Test Mac and GitHub workflow
goals.outcome: Clone, pull, push, and verify a small change from the laptop without breaking the branch.

goals.title: Pick five sellable bots
goals.outcome: Choose the five bots most likely to make money this month and define signup, usage, pricing, and demo path.

rule: Do not expand into unrelated new projects until the current repository, dashboard, inventory, top five bots, and bug list are demonstrable.
